linkWallet(bytes32,address).notice: Link the created Keyless Wallet to a registered user.

registerUser(bytes32,address,uint8).notice: Register a new user profile (owner + personality; wallet can be set later).

userdoc.notice: Decentralized backend for Sentry user profiles (chat-first identity).         Key is keccak256 hash of external user id (e.g. Telegram/WhatsApp).
